violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Some floor tiles in the mop sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2025

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. -Under shelving in dry storage -Under equipment in kitchen -Under soda dispenser and table -Back of cabinets by ordering area (few old droppings) The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitation to monitor new activity. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The floor in the mop sink area was observed with missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly and stored on a surface that is not clean in the storage and kitchen area. PIC covered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Gaskets (cold drawers, prep unit, freezer) 2. Ice Machine New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The floor in the mop sink area was observed chipped/missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024
